[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011111 6
1 1100000 2
2 1000011 3
3 1001110 4
4 0011101 4
5 0110000 2
6 1001111 5
7 0000001 1

70 0110001 3
